scripts.docker:dev: node backend/scripts/gen-version.mjs && node front/scripts/gen-version.mjs && docker-compose up --build
scripts.docker:prod: DB_FILE=strata.db NODE_ENV=production ENABLE_SWAGGER=false RESTART_POLICY=always sh -c 'node backend/scripts/gen-version.mjs && node front/scripts/gen-version.mjs && docker-compose up --build -d'
scripts.docker:reset: rm -f backend/.data/strata-dev.db && node backend/scripts/gen-version.mjs && node front/scripts/gen-version.mjs && docker-compose build --no-cache && docker-compose up
